raw_output:
Here is the Python code to generate Shopify listings for the given products:

```python
import json

products = [
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU001', 'name': 'Wireless Mouse', 'category': 'Electronics', 'cost_price': 5.0, 'stock': 50, 'weight_kg': 0.2, 'length_cm': 10, 'width_cm': 5, 'height_cm': 3, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Ergonomic mouse', 'brand': 'Logi', 'shipping_cost': 2, 'supplier_lead_days': 3},
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU002', 'name': 'USB Keyboard', 'category': 'Electronics', 'cost_price': 8.0, 'stock': 40, 'weight_kg': 0.5, 'length_cm': 45, 'width_cm': 15, 'height_cm': 3, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Compact keyboard', 'brand': 'KeyPro', 'shipping_cost': 3, 'supplier_lead_days': 4},
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU003', 'name': 'Phone Case', 'category': 'Accessories', 'cost_price': 2.0, 'stock': 100, 'weight_kg': 0.1, 'length_cm': 15, 'width_cm': 7, 'height_cm': 1, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Durable case', 'brand': 'SafeTech', 'shipping_cost': 1, 'supplier_lead_days': 2},
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU004', 'name': 'Bluetooth Speaker', 'category': 'Electronics', 'cost_price': 10.0, 'stock': 25, 'weight_kg': 0.7, 'length_cm': 20, 'width_cm': 10, 'height_cm': 10, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Portable speaker', 'brand': 'BoomX', 'shipping_cost': 4, 'supplier_lead_days': 5},
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU005', 'name': 'Laptop Stand', 'category': 'Office', 'cost_price': 7.0, 'stock': 30, 'weight_kg': 1.2, 'length_cm': 30, 'width_cm': 25, 'height_cm': 5, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Adjustable stand', 'brand': 'StandPro', 'shipping_cost': 3, 'supplier_lead_days': 4},
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU006', 'name': 'LED Desk Lamp', 'category': 'Home', 'cost_price': 6.0, 'stock': 35, 'weight_kg': 0.8, 'length_cm': 20, 'width_cm': 10, 'height_cm': 30, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Modern lamp', 'brand': 'BrightCo', 'shipping_cost': 3, 'supplier_lead_days': 3},
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU007', 'name': 'Water Bottle', 'category': 'Home', 'cost_price': 3.0, 'stock': 60, 'weight_kg': 0.3, 'length_cm': 25, 'width_cm': 7, 'height_cm': 7, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Reusable bottle', 'brand': 'Hydro', 'shipping_cost': 2, 'supplier_lead_days': 3},
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU008', 'name': 'Backpack', 'category': 'Travel', 'cost_price': 12.0, 'stock': 20, 'weight_kg': 1.5, 'length_cm': 40, 'width_cm': 30, 'height_cm': 15, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Travel bag', 'brand': 'PackPro', 'shipping_cost': 5, 'supplier_lead_days': 6},
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU009', 'name': 'Headphones', 'category': 'Electronics', 'cost_price': 15.0, 'stock': 18, 'weight_kg': 0.6, 'length_cm': 18, 'width_cm': 15, 'height_cm': 8, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Noise cancel', 'brand': 'SoundMax', 'shipping_cost': 4, 'supplier_lead_days': 5},
    {'supplier_sku': 'SKU010', 'name': 'Smart Watch', 'category': 'Electronics', 'cost_price': 20.0, 'stock': 15, 'weight_kg': 0.2, 'length_cm': 5, 'width_cm': 5, 'height_cm': 2, 'image_url': 'url', 'description': 'Fitness tracker', 'brand': 'FitPro', 'shipping_cost': 5, 'supplier_lead_days': 5}
]

shopify_listings = []

for product in products:
    sku = product['supplier_sku']
    title = product['name']
    bullets = []
    description = product['description']
    tags = [product['category'], product['brand']]

    if product['weight_kg'] > 0.1:
        bullets.append(f'Weight: {product["weight_kg"]} kg')
    if product['length_cm'] + product['width_cm'] + product['height_cm'] > 30:
        bullets.append(f'Dimensions: {product["length_cm"]} x {product["width_cm"]} x {product["height_cm"]} cm')

    shopify_listing = {
        'sku': sku,
        'title': title,
        'bullets': bullets,
        'description': description,
        'tags': tags
    }
    shopify_listings.append(shopify_listing)

print(json.dumps(shopify_listings, indent=4))
```

This code will generate a JSON list with the required information for each product. The `bullets` field contains additional details such as weight and dimensions if they are greater than 0.1 kg or 30 cm respectively.

Please note that you need to replace 'url' with actual image URLs for each product.
